content.en:
"Yes!"

The Underworld God nodded.

Many forces don't have enough Eternal Boundary Stones, after all, it's okay in normal times, who would hoard Eternal Boundary Stones!

Therefore, it is naturally feasible to replace the Eternal Boundary Stone with other resources.

However, ordinary resources are useless, and they must be resources that are helpful to the Eternal Realm God Realm before they can be exchanged for boundary stones.

Soon.

Ye Tian took out a batch of resources, and after estimating, it could probably be exchanged for hundreds of Eternal Boundary Stones, plus the Eternal Boundary Stones in his hand, it was easily exchanged for seven hundred Eternal Boundary Stones.

Subsequently, Ye Tian made a deal with the God of the Underworld Realm.

When Ye Tian handed over these resources and the Eternal Boundary Stone to the God of the Underworld Realm, the God of the Underworld also handed over a piece of information to Ye Tian.

"Ye Tian Realm God, if any Realm God wants to assassinate him in the future, he can also find our Hades Demon Palace!"

After saying that, the god of the underworld left.

"The Hades Demon Hall is really arrogant, and he dares to say words to assassinate the 07 gods of other realms!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But he also knew that as long as the Hades Temple didn't provoke other top forces, it wouldn't be in trouble.

And the price of the Hades Temple is high, and it never messes around, so there have been no problems so far.

Ye Tian browsed this piece of information.

"Sure enough, it's Tianhe Dao Mountain!"

Ye Tian appeared from the God of the Underworld and said that there was a force to assassinate him, so he guessed that it was Tianhe Dao Mountain, but the Demon Hall of the Underworld had already sent the God of the Realm, if he didn't have enough information to buy information, he was afraid that he would have some trouble.

Therefore, he still took out seven hundred Eternal Boundary Stones to buy this piece of information, which can be regarded as solving a small trouble.

"Tianhe Dao Mountain invited the Hades Demon Temple to kill me, but the Hades Demon Temple didn't do it, it must not be as the God of the Underworld said, they took the initiative to refuse, it must be that Tianhe Dao Mountain can't afford to make a bid!

Ye Tian said darkly.

Fortunately, Tianhe Daoshan is relatively poor, otherwise he would be in trouble now.

In case a high-level Realm God God of the Eternal Realm makes a move, he is really not an opponent, so he can only hide with his family, sacrifice one or two replica bodies, and treat it as being killed, and break through to the Eternal Realm God Realm High-level Realm God God God Realm in the future.

Fortunately, this did not happen.

"Tianhe Dao Mountain, this threat must be eliminated!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But Tianhe Dao Mountain is a powerful force after all, and a top force like the Hades Demon Hall dares to destroy Tianhe Dao Mountain, but he can't.

The top forces are not afraid of the Boundary Court, and the Boundary Court will not care about the top forces at all, but he is just the lord of the Terran Holy Country, a middle-level powerhouse in the Eternal Realm God Realm, if he dares to attack the Tianhe Dao Mountain, the Boundary Court will definitely take care of it.

"You can't attack Tianhe Dao Mountain as me, otherwise you'll be in big trouble!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But if he didn't attack Tianhe Dao Mountain, who knew if Tianhe Dao Mountain would ask the Hades Temple to attack and kill him again?

The Hades Temple doesn't care about anything, whoever gives the Eternal Realm Stone has more will take over the task.

"If I make a copy of a demon seed body, and then attack the Hades Demon Temple, sacrifice the demon seed to copy the body, maybe it's okay!"

Ye Tian had this idea in his heart.

In fact, he has always had the idea of copying the demon seed body, but it is not clear if his mind will be replaced after copying the demon seed body?

After all, after the Eternal Dao Realm Demon Seed is transformed, the mind will be replaced, and when it becomes a Demon Seed, it will no longer be itself.

Perhaps, after he copied it, he would be equivalent to the Eternal Realm God Realm Demon Seed, in that case, he would no longer be himself.

"Maybe you can give it a try!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course, such an experiment is somewhat dangerous and must be carried out in the Endless Realm Alliance and the Terran Holy Kingdom.

Eternal borders.

A death zone.

Ye Tian was going to copy the demon seed of a half-step Eternal Realm god, so that even if the demon seed was transformed and his thinking was replaced, he still had a way to copy the demon seed and kill the body, so there would be no problem.

"Start copying!"

Ye Tian began to copy the demon seed Linyuan, and it just so happened that the other party was a half-step demon seed of the Eternal Realm God Realm. []

Airplanes!!!!

The body of the demon seed Lin Yuan was copied little by little.

Just after the body of the demon seed Lin Yuan was copied, a terrifying will descended.

That's the will of the Demon Seed Abyss!

In an instant, his mind stagnated, and the will of the Demon Seed Abyss erased his copy body will, completely transforming the demon seed soul of this body, and a new will occupied his Demon Seed copy body.

This moment.

He couldn't even control the replica body, and this was the first time this had happened.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian immediately struck out and smashed the copy body of this demon seed with one blow, obliterating it.

"Sure enough, there is no way to copy the demon seed to copy the body, once it is copied, its own consciousness will be erased, and the will of the demon seed abyss will choose a blank new will to come and replace its own thinking. "

At this moment, he completely understood that once the demon seed was transformed, it would no longer be himself, and it would be impossible to have a chance to awaken his own will in the future.

From the moment he became a demon seed, he had already completely fallen.

However, this truth is not clear to many Eternal Dao Realms, and they are still fighting for the unknown hope, and they are not willing to destroy their Eternal Dao Seed, but will 170 take the initiative to become a demon seed.

Of course, even if he told this truth, those Eternal Dao Realms would not believe it, and even those realm gods would not necessarily believe it.

But.

Those top forces in the realm of the Realm God Realm may know this truth.

"There is no way for the demon seed to copy the body, and even if it is condensed, it is not controlled by itself, and there is no way to complete its own task!"

Ye Tian suddenly felt a little difficult.

Of course, there are other methods, such as copying the replica bodies of other realm gods, after all, a certain fallen realm god will condense the fifth eternal realm spirit, and then attack Tianhe Dao Mountain.

In this way, after completing the task, he committed suicide directly, and the realm court couldn't find out anything, and would only think that it was other realm gods pretending to be him, and he couldn't imagine that he did it.

"This method can only be used, although it is not as easy to use as copying the demon seed, and the physical body is not as strong as the demon seed, but at least there is hope!"

Ye Tian decided to copy an Eternal Supreme Dao Realm God mid-level powerhouse who condensed the four Eternal Realm Spirits.

It just so happened that when the Eternal Realm and the Demon Seed Abyss Demon Seed were killed, there was an Eternal Realm God Realm mid-level realm god who fell, and he could copy the body of that realm god.

"Just use the body of that Spirit Realm God!"

Ye Tian decided.
